title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at Meesho South Asia Partners - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at Meesho South Asia Partners - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Meesho South Asia Partners, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Digital Marketing Manager for our Noida operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Meesho South Asia Partners:
Meesho South Asia Partners is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs
• Develop and implement category growth strategies
• Create engaging content for product pages and social media
• Track key performance indicators including GMV, conversion rate, and ROI
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads
• Proficiency in Magento
• Proficiency in Customer Segmentation
• Proficiency in Shopify
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in SEO/SEM

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Professional development and training programs
• Flexible working hours
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Noida, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Meesho South Asia Partners!
